不要让他们进入到某个竹屋，就再也出不来。
草头三水拍着胸脯，眼神坚定。
“放心吧！”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773957319,"group_id":"7594319454041820185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"科学家突然发现有人说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2lR02Fgdoi5JOoN9kE+chYgae8ZdoUFD0TZTx2rboqf","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/06a1959175eb42ff8d23ed1c79f815a3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790075&x-signature=BOmWuQLCbAPWDsNwHed5Q4hsMEM%3D","user_id":"3650811797969079","user_name":"草头三水"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3650811797969079","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594319454041820185","book_info":{"abstract":"神识探查到妹妹情绪波动，触发‘护妹狂魔’隐藏任务。”
任务一：在幕后Boss手下带走妹妹。
任务二：隐藏金手指，伪装成修仙废柴。
林沨这种事最擅长了（先熟练的求饶，然后寻找逃跑路线）。
谁敢说林荧坷是“怪力女”……（拳头捏得咔咔响）
谁说的？站出来！林沨会让他知道什么叫“打不死的小强”！
本以为是意外穿越，谁知兄妹二人竟是万年布局的核心。
那又怎样？我只想守着老妹儿，在这冰冷的修仙界看一场烟火。
“哥，如果世界要毁灭我们呢？”
“那我就先治好自己，再帮你把这世界锤烂。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c38719a34fb04ee8fea0249e39447c69~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"草头三水","author_id":"","book_id":"7594319454041820185","book_name":"修仙没有娱乐，哼我们来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599982194471223833","read_count":"11","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"119254"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"47","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c38719a34fb04ee8fea0249e39447c69~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382181&x-signature=%2BmglVuXLtbcfsqTF7g%2BVCjFbz%2Fg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3650811797969079","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004941BA071AC2AC1BFE8EF1E1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,
